titleStmt.title: SII 30.236: original edition by N. Marxia Gandhi, A. Padmavathy and S. Swaminathan
No. 236. (A.R. No. 587 of 1915.) Dārukāpuram, Sankaranayinar koil Taluk, Tirunelveli District. Madhyasthanātha temple-on the south wall of the mahā-maṇḍapa. Māṟ. Vikrama-Pāṇḍya: year 5: 1255 A.D.

summary.p: This inscription begins with the praśasti Tirumālai mādu etc. It records the alottment of tax income by the king, when he stayed in the bed-chamber at Aḷḷiūr on the application of Vikramachōḷdēva who was described as his brother-in-law (machchāḻvi) to meet the expenses of the temple of Piṇakkaṟutta-nāyanār at Malaiyaḍikkuṟichi, a southern hamlet of Parāntakach-chaturvēdimaṅgalam in Āri-nāḍu as dēvadāna-iṟaiyili. The said land was purchased by one Seṅgōḍi Kuṇṟ an Chakrāyudaṉ alias Vikramapāṇḍyapaṉmaṉ of Malai-maṇḍalam from the kāraṇavar of this village. The taxes were also refixed according to the crops and the standards. (See No. 233 above)

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
tirumalai mātu peruvarai mārvuṟa poruppa māmaṭantait tiruppuyam puṇara pārmicai maṅkai nāmicai navila kacciyum
kaliṅkamum kaṅkamum maṅkamum kucciyum kukiramum kollamum vallamum Irayamum Irāyamum Īḻa mutalāya mu(r)ṟpaṭa venta
r muṟaimuṟai pukuntu kūṭal māḷikaik kopura mukappil Ārakkuvaiyum Āṉaiyamakarapaṭip pativayiṟ cellap patañ ciṟita
ruḷeṉṟetiretir vaṇaṅka Ēvalkeṭpap porupuli ticaippaṉa pukaliṭanteṭa yorutaṉi meru(ru)vilirukayal vaḷara mutta
miḻi nāvalaru māvā māmaṟaiyāroṭu komuṟai yetta Aimpulaṅ kaṭantor tamparivakaṟṟi Aṟucamaiya
mum yeṟṟuyar Eḻumukil tavaḻum muḻumaṇi neṭuṅkoṭṭaikaḷuṟu cimanta maṇ kaḷikūrat tikkaṭippaṭuttuc cakka
rañ cella veṇkali kaṭinti ceṅkol naṭappat tavaḷa mukappilt tavaḷat tanikkuṭai taṇṇilavu corintu maṇmuḻutu niḻa
ṟṟap pāṟkaṭalp paccaimāttikiriyiṉ meṟcela veṇṭirai vīcuvatoppak kaṟṟaikkavari koṟṟavar vīca canta
ru mārpil purantaraṉ puṉainta Ārañcātti yaṇimuṭicūṭi(vīra) vīrasimhāsanattu metaka viḷaṅka kaṭalilamute(ka)ḻa nīkkarum pevaṭava
lāccolai maṭamāmayile Eḻulakuṭaiyānicaiya kamalattūḻi vāḻumuyar kulattiruve kāttaruḷeṉṟu pāttiva makaḷir kaya
malarkuvikkuñ cemmalarcīṟaṭit tilatavāṇutal ce(ya)yaṭi karuṅkaṇ Ulaka muḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum vīṟṟiruntaruḷi māmutal matikku
lam viḷakkiya komutaṟ komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīvikramapāṇṭiyatevaṟku yāṇṭu Añcāvatu nāṭṭāṟṟu po
kku Aḷḷiyurp paḷḷiyaṟaikkūṭatteḻuntaruḷiyiruntu Ārināṭṭu śrī parāntakaccaturveti maṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai malai
yaṭikkuṟicciyiṟ piṇakkaṟuttīśvaramuṭaiyār koyiṟ tevakaṉmikkum civappirāmaṇaṟkuñ ceyyat tiruvāymoḻintaruḷi
ṉapaṭi Ittevaṟkut tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭun nimantaṅkaḷukku malaimaṇṭalattuc ceṅkoṭik kuṉṟaṉ cakrāyutanā
ṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiyapaṉmaṉ Ivvūrk kāraṇavar pakkal taṇṭeśvara vilaiyāka koṇṭiṭṭu Aṉupavittu varukiṟa Ivvūr māṉāparaṇa
ppereriyil cennāṟṟu maṭaippokki nilattukkuk kiḻellai puṅkaṅ kuḷattu nirnakkallukku meṟkum teṉnel
lai Ittevar tevatāṉa nilattukkum Āloṭu nattattil Ivvikkirama pāṇṭiyapanmaṉ Ivvūrk kāraṇavar pakkal Oṟṟi koṇ
ṭaṉupavittu varukiṟa nattattukku vaṭakkum melellai puṅkaṅ kuḷattukku nir pāykiṟa kālukkuk kiḻakkum vaṭavellai Ikkā
lukku teṟkum Āka nāṉkellaikkuṭpaṭṭa nirnilamum puṉceyum nattamum toṭṭamum Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻanteva
tānam paḷḷiccantam nikkiyu
ḷḷa nilam kaṭamaiyum An
rāyam viniyokamun taruvatā
riyavārāṭciyum tevapa
pāṭṭamum pañcupili cantuvi
kkiramapeṟum vācalppeṟum
Ilāñciṉaippeṟum ta
ṟiyiṟai ṟa ta
ṭṭaḷipāṭṭamum I
ṟa variyum Iṉavariyum pe
ruvariyum maṟṟumeppeṟ
paṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa I
vvāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa
Iṟaiyiliyā yiṟukkavum I
ṟukkumiṭattu payir pāṟtuppa
ḷacāvi nikkip payir koṇṭa nila
ttukku paṉniraṭikkolāl mā
ttāl Ivvūrk kaṭamaiyiṟukku
ṅ kālāl nellu Eḻukalamum ku
ṟuvai viḷainta nilattukku Ivva
ricaiyiloṉṟu mukkālum tulā
viṟaittu viḷainta nilattukku
māttāl Oṉṟu pātiyum Eḷvaraku
tiṉaippullu viḷainta nilattukku mā
ttāl patiṉāṟu meṉit tiramam Oṉṟu
puṉcey viḷainta nilattukku māttā
l tiramam Araiyum Āka Iṟuppatāka I
ṟai kaṭṭappeṟaveṇumeṉṟummac
cāḻ(vi) vikramacoḻatevar namakkuc co
ṉṉamaiyil Ittevaṟku tiruppaṭi
māṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭu nivantaṅkaḷuk
ku malaimaṇṭalattu ceṅkoṭikkuṉ
ṟaṉ cakrāyutaṉāṉa vikkiramapāṇṭiyapaṉmaṉ I
vvūrk kāraṇavar pakkal caṇṭeśvaravara vilai
yāka koṇṭiṭṭu Aṉupavittu varukiṟa
Ivvūr māṉāparaṇappereriyil ceṉ
ṉāṟṟu maṭaippokki nilattukkuk kiḻellai
puṅkaṅkuḷattukku nirnakkallukku
meṟkum teṉnellai Ittevar
tevatāṉa nilattukkum Ā
loṭu nattattil Ivikrama
pāṇṭiyapaṉmaṉ Ivvūrk kāra
ṇavar pakkal Oṟṟikoṇṭu A
ṉupavittu varukiṟa nat
tattukku vaṭakkum me
lellai puṅkaṅkuḷattu ni
r pāykiṟa kālukkuk kiḻak
kum vaṭavellai Ikkā
lukku teṟkum Āka nāṉ
kellaik kuṭpaṭṭa nir nila
mum puṉceyum nattamu toṭṭamum
Uṭpaṭṭa nilattil paḻanteva
tāṉam paḷḷiccantam nikki(kki)
yuḷḷa nilaṅkaṭamai yanta
rāyamum niviyokamunRead- viniyOkamtaruva
vatāṉa vaccuṅ kāriyavārāycci
yuṅ veṭṭipāṭṭamum pañcupili
cantuvikkirakappeṟum vācalpe
ṟum Ilāñcaṉaippeṟum taṟiyiṟai
cekkiṟai taṭṭoḷipāṭṭamum Iṭai
yarvariyum Iṉavariyum poṉvariyum
maṟṟum Epperppaṭṭaṉavum Uṭpaṭa I
vvāṇṭu mutal tevatāṉa Iṟai(yiṟai)
Iliyāka Iṟukkavum Iṟukkumiṭattu pāḻcāvi
nīkkip payiṟṟeṟṟi koṇṭa nilattukku paṉ
ṉiraṭik kolāl māttāl Ivvūrk ka
ṭamaiyiṟukkuṅ kālāl nellu Eḻuka
(kaḻukala)mum kuṟuvai viḷainta nilattuk
ku Ivvaricaiyilloṉṟu mukkālum tu
lā viṟaittu viḷainta nilattukku Oṉṟu
pātiyum Eḷ varaku tiṉai pullu viḷainta
Digital edition of SII 30.236 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
